title: EwtosBrain Vault Blueprint
description: Declarative description of a vault layout: folders, files, .base views, CLAUDE.md sections, briefing sources. Used by the EwtosBrain Setup-Agent and the /vaults/{id}/blueprint/* endpoints. Designed to be readable by an LLM that wants to compose or extend a vault setup.

schema_version.description: Blueprint schema major.minor. Must match ^1\. for this version.

blueprint_id.description: Stable kebab-case id, e.g. 'karpathy-para-base'. Used as filename and reference target for extends[].

blueprint_version.description: SemVer of this blueprint instance (independent of schema_version).

license.description: SPDX license id or free-form license string.

description.description: One-paragraph human description of what this blueprint produces.

extends.description: Parent blueprint ids that are resolved recursively before commit. Cycles are an error.

vars.description: Free-form key/value pairs (owner_name, branche, ...). Merged child-overrides-parent and exposed in template render context.

folders.description: Directories to mkdir relative to vault root.

path.description: POSIX-relative path, no leading slash, no '..', no backslashes.

kind.description: Semantic role of this folder. Used by UI grouping and by other tools to find e.g. 'all asset folders'.

asset_type.description: If kind=asset: which entity (creator, video, playlist, kunde, mitarbeiter, ...).

files.description: Files to create from a Jinja2 template or an inline literal.

template.description: Relative Jinja2 template ref inside server/tools/blueprint_templates/. Mutually exclusive with template_inline.

template_inline.description: Inline literal content. Written as-is, NOT passed through Jinja2 (so backslash-sequences are NOT interpreted).

vars.description: Per-file variables passed to the template context (unfolded to top-level keys).

merge_policy.description: How to behave if the target file already exists.

bases.description: Obsidian .base view definitions. Rendered to YAML by server/tools/base_generator.py.

claude_md_sections.description: Sections to merge into <vault>/CLAUDE.md via marker-merger.

template.description: Optional Jinja2 template ref. If set, overrides 'content'.

briefing_sources.description: Briefing-source keys this blueprint activates (e.g. 'wetter', 'todos', 'playlist_trending'). Merged as set-union with parents.

permissions_defaults.description: Default per-vault permissions (e.g. write_raw, write_playlists). Child overrides parent.

system_prompt_template.description: Optional Jinja2 template ref for the vault's system prompt. Child wins on conflict.

signature.description: Optional ed25519 signature. Verified against server/blueprint_trusted_keys.json.
